response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Active open-source contributor with leadership in developer tooling
Proven mentorship through workshops and community technical education
concerns: No demonstrable cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership of cloud or DevOps teams
